name: Joyce Beatty
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $431,314 for Joyce Beatty in U.S. House, OH-03. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
